description: city and county seat of Cook County, and largest city in State of Illinois, United States of America
description_wiki: Chicago is the most populous city in the U.S. state of Illinois and in the Midwestern United States.

description: United States Army installation located in North Central Kansas
description_wiki: Fort Riley is a United States Army installation located in North Central Kansas, on the Kansas River, also known as the Kaw, between Junction City and Manhattan.

description: former US Army post in California
description_wiki: Fort Ord is a former United States Army post on Monterey Bay on the Pacific Ocean coast in California, which closed in 1994 due to Base Realignment and Closure (BRAC) action.

description: 1939–1945 global conflict
description_wiki: World War II, or the Second World War (1 September 1939 – 2 September 1945), was a global conflict between two coalitions: the Allies and the Axis powers.

aliases: War to Resist US Aggression and Aid Korea
description: war between North and South Korea, 1950–1953
description_wiki: The Korean War (25 June 1950 – 27 July 1953) was an armed conflict the Korean Peninsula fought between North Korea (Democratic People's Republic of Korea; DPRK) and South Korea (Republic of Korea; ROK) and their allies.

aliases: Ground forces of the United States Armed Forces
description: land service branch of the United States Armed Forces
description_wiki: The United States Army (U.S. Army) is the land service branch of the United States Armed Forces.

description: ocean between Asia, Australia and the Americas
description_wiki: The Pacific Ocean is the largest and deepest of Earth's five oceanic divisions.

description: 1941-1996 combat formation of the United States Army
description_wiki: The 24th Infantry Division was an infantry division of the United States Army that was deactivated in October 1996.

description: United States Army infantry regiment
description_wiki: The 21st Infantry Regiment ("Gimlet") is a United States Army infantry regiment.

description: 1941 Japanese surprise attack on the U.S
description_wiki: On December 7, 1941, the Empire of Japan launched a surprise military strike on the United States Pacific Fleet at its naval base at Pearl Harbor on Oahu, Hawaii.

description: region in East Asia
description_wiki: Korea is a peninsular region in East Asia consisting of the Korean Peninsula, Jeju Island, and smaller islands.

description: city in and county seat of King County, State of Washington, United States
description_wiki: Seattle (  see-AT-əl) is the most populous city in the U.S. state of Washington and the Pacific Northwest region of North America.

description: city in Aleutians West Census Area, Alaska, United States
description_wiki: Adak (, AY-dack; Aleut: Adaax, pronounced [ˈaðɑχ]), formerly Adak Station, is a city located on Adak Island, in the Aleutians West Census Area, Alaska, United States.

description: island country in East Asia
description_wiki: Japan is an island country in East Asia.

surface_forms: That boat, it's called the USS Freeman

description: designated city in Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan
description_wiki: Yokohama (Japanese: 横浜; pronounced [jokohama] ) is the second-largest city in Japan by population as well as by area, and the country's most populous municipality.

description: city in Seoul Capital Area, South Korea
description_wiki: Incheon is a city located in northwestern South Korea, bordering Seoul and Gyeonggi Province to the east.

description: military unit
description_wiki: The 34th Infantry Regiment (special designation "Leyte Dragons") is a Regular Army infantry regiment of the United States Army.

description: infantry regiment of the United States Army
description_wiki: The 19th Infantry Regiment ("Rock of Chickamauga") is a United States Army infantry regiment which is assigned to the US Army Training and Doctrine Command, with the assignment of conducting Basic and Advanced Infantry Training.

description: circle of latitude
military police in the United States Army
description_wiki: The United States Army Military Police Corps (USAMPC) is the uniformed law enforcement branch of the United States Army.

description: demilitarized zone in Korea
description_wiki: The Korean Demilitarized Zone (Korean: 한반도/조선반도 비무장 지대), also known as simply the Korean DMZ or KDMZ, is a strip of land running across the Korean Peninsula which intersects the 38th parallel north.

description: international airport serving Seoul, South Korea
description_wiki: Gimpo International Airport (IATA: GMP, ICAO: RKSS), formerly rendered in English as Kimpo International Airport, is located in the far western end of Seoul, the capital of South Korea, some 15 kilometres (9 mi) west of the central district of Seoul.

description: capital and largest city of Japan
description_wiki: Tokyo, officially the Tokyo Metropolis, is the capital and most populous city of Japan.

description: airlifter family
description_wiki: The Douglas C-124 Globemaster II, nicknamed "Old Shaky", is a retired American heavy-lift cargo aircraft built by the Douglas Aircraft Company in Long Beach, California.

aliases: Veterans of Foreign Wars of the United States
Veterans of Foreign Wars of the U.S.
description: organization of U.S. war veterans
description_wiki: The Veterans of Foreign Wars (VFW), formally the Veterans of Foreign Wars of the United States, is an organization of United States war veterans who fought in wars, campaigns, and expeditions on foreign land, waters, or airspace as military service members.
